purpose: Rubric evidence index for FFAI Robothon 2026 judging
evidence_policy: Scores are intentionally omitted. Judges should regenerate artifacts with make quick, make eval, make plots, and make test.

claims: single Python entrypoint with quick and full demo modes
Make targets for demo, eval, plots, tuning, and tests
pinned Python dependencies
core artifacts regenerated from the runner
elliptic friction cones, multiccd, condim 6 pad contacts, and pair friction overrides
free-joint needle and suture objects with gravity and frictional manipulation
frame-position, joint-position, and touch sensors consumed by controller and monitors
real qvel impulse disturbance during knot-stage slip recovery
long-horizon suturing workflow rather than a reach-only demo
three hoop passes, thread draw, knot cinch, and verification press
explicit stage labels and machine-readable success signals
stage planner plus bounded PID residual feedback
anti-windup integral clipping and correction clipping
open-loop ablation via use_feedback=false
optional CMA-ES gain tuning over PID gains
ten independently actuated finger joints
five fingertip touch channels
friction-only needle grasp with no equality weld on the grasp
lift, hoop passage, thread attachment, slip recovery, and button press signals
focused tests cover model inventory, rollout signals, evaluation, and plots
diagnostic plots generated from JSON artifacts
artifacts are produced by code rather than manually edited score claims
MuJoCo renderer is used when available and render backend is reported
trajectory diagnostics show palm error, feedback correction, touch forces, needle height, and hoop progress
evaluation plot compares endpoint error and success rate for open-loop and closed-loop rollouts
micro-surgical needle-and-suture workflow
frictional five-finger grasp with slip recovery
paired robustness ablation and optional gain optimization
